  1. de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label
  2. TermLabel

Uses of Interface
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label.TermLabel

Packages that use TermLabel
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.control
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.builder
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp
This package contains pretty-printing functionality used by the GUI and for saving proofs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst
contains classes for the instantiation of schema variables of Taclets.
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.instructions
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang
This package contains the specification language frontends of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml
This package provides the functionalities of parsing JML comments into KeY constructs.
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy
This package contains classes implementing the proof search strategies of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    JTerm
    TermBuilder.addLabel(JTerm term, TermLabel label)
    Adds a label to a term, removing any existing labels of the same type.
    JTerm
    TermBuilder.addLabelToAllSubs(JTerm term, TermLabel label)
    Applies the label to the term and almost every (direct or indirect) sub-term recursively.
    boolean
    JTerm.containsLabel(TermLabel label)
    checks if the given label is attached to the term
    boolean
    LabeledTermImpl.containsLabel(TermLabel label)
    returns true if the given label is attached

    TermBuilder.label(JTerm term, TermLabel label)
    Applies a label to a term, removing any existing labels.

    Adds labels to a term, removing any existing labels of the same type.

  • Uses of TermLabel in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label

    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label with type parameters of type TermLabel
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    SingletonLabelFactory<T extends TermLabel>
    A factory for creating singleton TermLabel.
    interface 
    TermLabelFactory<T extends TermLabel>
    A factory for creating TermLabel objects.
    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label that implement TermLabel
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final record 
    BlockContractValidityTermLabel
    Label attached to the modality of the validity branch of a block contract.
    class 
    FormulaTermLabel
    Label attached to a predicates for instance in postconditions, loop invariants or precondition checks of applied operation contracts.
    class 
    OriginTermLabel
    An OriginTermLabel saves a term's origin in the JML specification (OriginTermLabel.getOrigin()) as well as the origins of all of its subterms and former subterms (OriginTermLabel.getSubtermOrigins()).
    final class 
    ParameterlessTermLabel
    The Class ParameterlessTermLabel can be used to define labels without parameters.
    final record 
    SymbolicExecutionTermLabel
    Label attached to a symbolic execution thread.
    Fields in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.label declared as TermLabel
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final TermLabel
    ParameterlessTermLabel.ANON_HEAP_LABEL
    Label attached to anonymisation heap function symbols as for instance introduce in UseOperationContractRule or WhileInvariantRule.
    static final TermLabel
    ParameterlessTermLabel.IMPLICIT_SPECIFICATION_LABEL
    Label attached to a term which is specified implicitly (by the JML specification).
    static final TermLabel
    ParameterlessTermLabel.LOOP_SCOPE_INDEX_LABEL
    Label attached to loop scope index variables in LoopScopeInvariantRule.
    static final TermLabel
    ParameterlessTermLabel.POST_CONDITION_LABEL
    Label attached to the post-condition.
    static final TermLabel
    ParameterlessTermLabel.SELECT_SKOLEM_LABEL
    Label attached to skolem constants introduced by the rule pullOutSelect.
    static final TermLabel
    ParameterlessTermLabel.SELF_COMPOSITION_LABEL
    Label attached to the post condition.
    static final TermLabel
    ParameterlessTermLabel.SHORTCUT_EVALUATION_LABEL
    Label attached to a term with the logical operator '||' or '&&' to distinguish from '|' or '&' respectively.
    static final TermLabel
    ParameterlessTermLabel.UNDEFINED_VALUE_LABEL
    Label attached to a term which denotes an undefined value.

    Method
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<TermLabel>
    LabelCollection.getLabels()
    returns the underlying collection of labels (careful, you get full access to the underlying set)
    static ImmutableArray<TermLabel>

    static final TermLabel
    SymbolicExecutionUtil.LOOP_BODY_LABEL
    Label attached to the modality which executes a loop body in branch "Body Preserves Invariant" of applied "Loop Invariant" rules.
    static final TermLabel
    SymbolicExecutionUtil.LOOP_INVARIANT_NORMAL_BEHAVIOR_LABEL
    Label attached to the implication when a loop body execution terminated normally without any exceptions, returns or breaks in branch "Body Preserves Invariant" of applied "Loop Invariant" rules to show the loop invariant.
    static final TermLabel
    SymbolicExecutionUtil.RESULT_LABEL
    Label attached to a JTerm to evaluate in a side proof.
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util with parameters of type TermLabel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.computeResults(Services services, Proof proof, ProofEnvironment sideProofEnvironment, Sequent sequentToProve, TermLabel label, String description, String methodTreatment, String loopTreatment, String queryTreatment, String splittingOption, boolean addNamesToServices)
    Starts the side proof and extracts the result JTerm.

    SymbolicExecutionUtil.removeLabelRecursive(TermFactory tf, JTerm term, TermLabel label)
